mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_bank_card (user_id, pool_card_id, card_number, alias_name, is_default, bind_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{poolCardId}, #{cardNumber}, #{aliasName}, #{isDefault}, #{bindStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_bank_card WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND bind_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY is_default DESC, bind_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM user_bank_card WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND pool_card_id = #{poolCardId} AND bind_status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE user_bank_card SET is_default = FALSE WHERE user_id = #{userId}; UPDATE user_bank_card SET is_default = TRUE WHERE id = #{cardId}
UPDATE user_bank_card SET bind_status = 'UNBOUND' WHERE id = #{id}
